creator: tundra@tundraware.com
text:
I am seeing a similar thing with 3.3R - When the machine ran 2.2.8, I got
about 6 seconds of clock drift per day.  Under 3.3R, it moves over 1000 seconds
per date if  do not do regular (every 10 minutes) ntpdate...
--
